case_title: LUIS F. POTENZA VS. WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF LUIS F. POTENZA APPEARED. DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC., REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA M. RODRIGUEZ, ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED MAY-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POTENZA, LUIS F. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY POTENZA, LUIS F. AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
